title: rubus goniophorus
intro: Rubus goniophorus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Indian raspberry, is a plant species belonging to the rose family. The medicinal properties of Rubus goniophorus lie in its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
